level_signals: Expected to own programs end-to-end and drive cross-functional collaboration

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 3+ years of program management experience, with a focus on operational process design, implementation, and scaling
Willingness and ability to perform hands-on casework alongside program responsibilities
Strong problem-solving skills with the ability to use data to drive decisions and measure impact
Excellent communication skills—comfortable conveying complex or sensitive topics to both technical and non-technical audiences
Experience managing multiple concurrent projects in a fast-paced, high-growth environment with shifting priorities

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Experience in financial services or fintech, particularly in collections or lending operations
Familiarity with automation tools and techniques, including a working knowledge of SQL
Experience in change management—taking initiatives from conception through scaled execution
Background in a compliance-sensitive environment with knowledge of relevant regulatory frameworks
Experience designing or managing QA programs, including audit methodologies, scoring calibration, and quality feedback loops

scope.surface: Stripe Capital collections operations — recovery of overdue loans, program design, and scaling
scope.business_model: B2B fintech / financial infrastructure — lending product (Stripe Capital)
core_responsibilities: Own complex and escalated collections cases end-to-end
Design, launch, and manage collections programs aligned with business objectives, regulatory requirements, and customer experience goals
Identify opportunities to automate, standardize, and scale collections operations
Ensure regulatory and policy compliance across all collections activities
Build and maintain QA frameworks including audits and calibration
Monitor program performance through analytics and develop data-driven strategies
Partner with Product, Engineering, Compliance, and Operations teams
Build and maintain process documentation, playbooks, and training materials

green_flags: Clear articulation of responsibilities spanning both strategic and hands-on work
Encourages applicants who meet minimum requirements to apply even if they don't meet preferred qualifications
Cross-functional scope with Product, Engineering, and Compliance signals meaningful organizational influence
Explicit mention of compliance and QA frameworks suggests a mature operational environment
red_flags: No location, work authorization, or visa sponsorship information stated anywhere in the JD
Role requires hands-on casework in collections which may not appeal to candidates seeking purely strategic PM roles

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from 3+ years requirement and scope of responsibilities)
scope.business_model (inferred from Stripe Capital product description)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not explicitly listed as KPIs in JD)
ambiguities: No location information is provided in the JD — it is unclear whether this role is remote, hybrid, or onsite, and in which geography

Archetype is ambiguous: role combines program management (Technical Program Manager) with ops strategy and hands-on casework (BizOps / Strategy & Ops); classified as Technical Program Manager with BizOps secondary
